Hungary has 3 bronze medals and Canada also has 3 bronze medals. To find out how many more bronze medals Hungary has than Canada, we subtract Canada's bronze medals from Hungary's bronze medals (3 - 3). The result is 0, meaning Hungary does not have any more bronze medals than Canada.
